CustomField.formula: IF( TEXT(leaseworks__Transaction_Type__c) = 'MR Invoice', IF( ISBLANK(leaseworks__Invoice_Line_Item__c), IF( OR( leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Doc_Status__c = 'Pending', leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Doc_Status__c = 'Declined', leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Doc_Status__c = 'Cancelled', leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Doc_Status__c = 'Submitted', ISBLANK(leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Doc_Status__c) ), NULL, leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent_Utilization__r.leaseworks__Total_Maintenance_Reserve__c ), IF( OR( ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Invoice_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Status__c, 'Pending'), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Invoice_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Status__c, 'Declined'), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Invoice_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Status__c, 'Cancelled'), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Invoice_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Status__c, 'Submitted') ), NULL, leaseworks__Invoice_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Amount_Due__c ) ), IF( TEXT(leaseworks__Transaction_Type__c) = 'MR Invoice Reconciliation', IF( ISBLANK(leaseworks__Invoice_Line_Item__c), 0, IF( OR( ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Invoice_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Status__c, 'Pending'), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Invoice_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Status__c, 'Declined'), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Invoice_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Status__c, 'Cancelled') ), NULL, leaseworks__Invoice_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Amount_Due__c ) ), NULL ) )
CustomField.label: _Amount CC ILI
